purpose: Canonical judge-first copy for track workspaces, reviewer packets, and the first 30 to 45 seconds of track videos.

tracks.title: Frontier Reviewer Packet
whatWorksNow: Lead the first 90 seconds from /start into /command-center with a real wallet-first path.
Use /proof/?judge=1, trust package, diagnostics, and services as the second-stage proof of maturity.
Keep the README, deck, story video, and track center perfectly aligned with the live site.

externallyProven.label: Proof center
externallyProven.summary: The full governance lifecycle, proof packets, and reviewer path are already visible inside the live product.

externallyProven.label: Launch trust packet
externallyProven.summary: The repo already binds launch truth, blockers, and buyer-safe trust wording into one explicit packet.

tracks.exactBlockerSummary: The startup-quality path remains blocked until production multisig, authority transfer signatures, and post-transfer readouts are recorded.
tracks.bestDemoSummary: Lead with /start, then keep proof, custody truth, and the blocker in the same judge flow instead of splitting the story across routes.
openingSequence: What works now: Lead the first 90 seconds from /start into /command-center with a real wallet-first path. Use /proof/?judge=1, trust package, diagnostics, and services as the second-stage proof of maturity. Keep the README, deck, story video, and track center perfectly aligned with the live site.
What is externally proven: Proof center via /proof and Launch trust packet via /documents/launch-trust-packet.
Exact blocker: upgrade-authority-multisig. The startup-quality path remains blocked until production multisig, authority transfer signatures, and post-transfer readouts are recorded.
Best demo route: open /start first. Lead with /start, then keep proof, custody truth, and the blocker in the same judge flow instead of splitting the story across routes.
tracks.voiceoverScript: What works now: Lead the first 90 seconds from /start into /command-center with a real wallet-first path. Use /proof/?judge=1, trust package, diagnostics, and services as the second-stage proof of maturity. Keep the README, deck, story video, and track center perfectly aligned with the live site. What is externally proven: Proof center via /proof and Launch trust packet via /documents/launch-trust-packet. Exact blocker: upgrade-authority-multisig. The startup-quality path remains blocked until production multisig, authority transfer signatures, and post-transfer readouts are recorded. Best demo route: open /start first. Lead with /start, then keep proof, custody truth, and the blocker in the same judge flow instead of splitting the story across routes.

tracks.title: Confidential Governance Reviewer Packet
whatWorksNow: Use the comprehensive story video as the first-pass demo for judges.
Lead the click path from /security to the ZK matrix, confidence engine, and V3 proof packet.
Keep the pitch deck anchored around private governance, confidential payouts, and honest launch boundaries.

externallyProven.label: Live Proof V3
externallyProven.summary: Devnet proposal lifecycle, V3 hardening, and explorer-verifiable proof anchors are already documented.

externallyProven.label: ZK capability matrix
externallyProven.summary: The repo already states what the privacy layer proves today and what remains outside the claim boundary.

tracks.exactBlockerSummary: Privacy launch remains blocked until settlement receipts or verifier-grade source proof replace the current integration boundary.
tracks.bestDemoSummary: Lead with /story, then keep proof, custody truth, and the blocker in the same judge flow instead of splitting the story across routes.

tracks.title: Runtime Infrastructure Reviewer Packet
whatWorksNow: Show diagnostics, runtime evidence, and hosted read/API packaging in one buyer-friendly path.
Use the service catalog, SLA, pricing, and trust package as the commercial proof layer.
Keep the Fast RPC role explicit in video, deck, README, and services UI.

externallyProven.label: Diagnostics
externallyProven.summary: Latency, success rate, wallet coverage, proof completion, and incident-facing diagnostics are already surfaced live.

externallyProven.label: Frontier integrations
externallyProven.summary: Hosted-read and runtime evidence already prove the infrastructure story on Devnet with reviewer-facing artifacts.

tracks.exactBlockerSummary: RPC and hosted-read mainnet claims remain blocked until live monitoring, alert delivery, and tested operator ownership are recorded.
tracks.bestDemoSummary: Lead with /services, then keep proof, custody truth, and the blocker in the same judge flow instead of splitting the story across routes.
